docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-26-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-31-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP EMERITUS, TOWING QUALITY & ASSURANCE). DEFENDANT REZA MICHAEL JANNATI IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS KATHERINE DOYLE. COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH BUS & PC 17918. CCP 116.430 (A) (B). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$435.00); PROOF OF SERVICE LABELED 'FILED BY FAX' SERVED JUN-13-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JANNATI, REZA MICHAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT JANNATI, REZA MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY AUTORETURN JANNATI, REZA MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS, TOWING QUALITY & ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
